attributes.title: SOC 01 - Executive Overview / Header
attributes.visState:
{"title":"SOC 01 - Executive Overview / Header","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# SOC 01 - Executive Overview

Vue d'ouverture pour voir ce qui brûle, quels hôtes sont exposés et si la volumétrie change brutalement.

**Code couleur SOC**
- 🔴 Critical / urgence immédiate
- 🟠 High / investigation prioritaire
- 🟡 Medium / validation analyste
- 🟢 Low / contexte / hygiène

**À surveiller**
- Pic d'alertes soudain
- Un hôte qui explose
- Montée des auth failures
- Nouvelle technique MITRE dominante
- Hôte silencieux
","fontSize":14,"openLinksInNewTab":true},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: Executive • Top 10 agents les plus alertés
SOC 01 - Executive Overview
attributes.description: Vue d'ouverture SOC. S'appuie sur wazuh-alerts-*, wazuh-monitoring-* et wazuh-states-vulnerabilities-*.

attributes.title: SOC 02 - Threat Detection / Header
attributes.visState:
{"title":"SOC 02 - Threat Detection / Header","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# SOC 02 - Threat Detection / Active Incidents

Détection active pour compromis, bruteforce, persistence, exécution suspecte et début de mouvement latéral.

**Code couleur SOC**
- 🔴 Critical / urgence immédiate
- 🟠 High / investigation prioritaire
- 🟡 Medium / validation analyste
- 🟢 Low / contexte / hygiène

**À surveiller**
- Alertes niveau 12+ en temps réel
- Top règles d'attaque
- MITRE dominantes
- IP agressives
- Incidents à traiter maintenant
","fontSize":14,"openLinksInNewTab":true},"aggs":[]}

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"full_log:(nc OR ncat OR curl OR wget OR powershell OR \"cmd.exe\" OR rundll32 OR regsvr32 OR wmic OR psexec)","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

{"query":{"query":"rule.level >= 12 OR rule.groups:(attack OR authentication_failed OR sudo OR syscheck)","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

attributes.title: SOC 03 - Authentication / Header
attributes.visState:
{"title":"SOC 03 - Authentication / Header","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# SOC 03 - Authentication & Privilege Abuse

Bruteforce, password spraying, comptes anormaux et élévation de privilèges.

**Code couleur SOC**
- 🔴 Critical / urgence immédiate
- 🟠 High / investigation prioritaire
- 🟡 Medium / validation analyste
- 🟢 Low / contexte / hygiène

**À surveiller**
- Échecs et succès de connexion
- Top comptes/IP/hosts ciblés
- Root login et sudo
- Comptes/groupes admin modifiés
","fontSize":14,"openLinksInNewTab":true},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: SOC 04 - FIM / Header
attributes.visState:
{"title":"SOC 04 - FIM / Header","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# SOC 04 - Endpoint Integrity / FIM Critical Changes

Surveillance des changements sensibles, webroots et points de persistence.

**Code couleur SOC**
- 🔴 Critical / urgence immédiate
- 🟠 High / investigation prioritaire
- 🟡 Medium / validation analyste
- 🟢 Low / contexte / hygiène

**À surveiller**
- Fichiers critiques
- Webroot changes
- Permissions/owners/hash changed
- Top hosts FIM
- Validation analyste
","fontSize":14,"openLinksInNewTab":true},"aggs":[]}

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"rule.groups:syscheck AND (syscheck.path:*passwd* OR syscheck.path:*shadow* OR syscheck.path:*sudoers* OR syscheck.path:*sshd_config* OR syscheck.path:*crontab*)","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

{"query":{"query":"rule.groups:syscheck AND (syscheck.path:*cron* OR syscheck.path:*Startup* OR syscheck.path:*RunOnce* OR syscheck.path:*systemd*)","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

{"query":{"query":"rule.groups:syscheck AND (syscheck.path:*/usr/bin* OR syscheck.path:*/usr/sbin* OR syscheck.path:*/bin* OR syscheck.path:*/sbin*)","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

attributes.title: SOC 04 - Endpoint Integrity / FIM Critical Changes

attributes.visState:
{"title":"SOC 06 - Agent Health / Header","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# SOC 06 - Agent Health & Telemetry Reliability

Fiabilité de la télémétrie et visibilité SOC. Un SOC aveugle est un faux SOC.

**Code couleur SOC**
- 🔴 Critical / urgence immédiate
- 🟠 High / investigation prioritaire
- 🟡 Medium / validation analyste
- 🟢 Low / contexte / hygiène

**À surveiller**
- Active / disconnected / never connected
- Dernière remontée
- Agents silencieux
- Versions agents
- Volumes en baisse
","fontSize":14,"openLinksInNewTab":true},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: SOC 07 - Windows / Header
attributes.visState:
{"title":"SOC 07 - Windows / Header","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# SOC 07 - Windows Security Monitoring

Vue dédiée Windows : logons, privilèges, process, services, RDP, PowerShell.

**Code couleur SOC**
- 🔴 Critical / urgence immédiate
- 🟠 High / investigation prioritaire
- 🟡 Medium / validation analyste
- 🟢 Low / contexte / hygiène

**À surveiller**
- 4625 failed logons
- 4672 privileged logons
- 4688 process creation
- 7045 service install
- PowerShell / RDP
","fontSize":14,"openLinksInNewTab":true},"aggs":[]}

attributes.visState:
{"title":"SOC 08 - Linux / Header","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# SOC 08 - Linux Security Monitoring

Vue Linux : SSH, sudo, root, cron/systemd, téléchargements suspects et persistence.

**Code couleur SOC**
- 🔴 Critical / urgence immédiate
- 🟠 High / investigation prioritaire
- 🟡 Medium / validation analyste
- 🟢 Low / contexte / hygiène

**À surveiller**
- SSH failed/success
- sudo usage
- root activity
- cron/systemd changes
- curl/wget/nc
","fontSize":14,"openLinksInNewTab":true},"aggs":[]}

{"title":"SOC 09 - Web / Header","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# SOC 09 - Web & DMZ Monitoring

- 🟡 Medium / validation analyste
- 🟢 Low / contexte / hygiène

**À surveiller**
- Top 404/403/500
- Top clients
- Top URLs
- Attaques web
- Webroot changes
","fontSize":14,"openLinksInNewTab":true},"aggs":[]}
